title: First Blood
description: You've proven yourself to Gormund the Pitmaster, and now it's time to enter the arena proper. Your first challenge: survive the Bloodsand Gauntlet. Three rounds of combat against increasingly dangerous opponents. Victory brings gold and glory. Defeat brings... well, let's not think about that.

objectives.description: Register for the Bloodsand Gauntlet with Gormund
Survive Round 1: The Pit Fighters (0/3 opponents)
Survive Round 2: The Beast Handlers (0/2 beasts)

notes: First tier arena combat quest. Unlocks after completing the novice tournament.
